svg.text: How industry leaders cache at scale — E-commerce, Social Media, Financial, Content, and Gaming
Product pages are read 100x more than they are updated. Cache-aside lets the app control invalidation when prices change.
Cache keys: product:{id}, category:{id}:page:{n}. Invalidation: publish events on price/inventory changes.
Strong consistency required — write latency is acceptable trade-off
Key Insight: Real-world systems combine multiple strategies — CDN for static assets, cache-aside for product data, write-behind for social feeds, and write-through for financial transactions.
